en: Thank you. Thank you very much.
ko: 매우 감사합니다. 오늘 밤 여기 있게 되어 기쁩니다.

en: It's a pleasure to be here tonight.
ko: 매우 감사합니다. 오늘 밤 여기 있게 되어 기쁩니다.
좋은 저녁입니다, 신 없는 소돔 사람들.

en: What are you doing? I'm bringing the truth, Jon.
We're in Hollywood, the belly of the beast. You can't just read the prompter?
I'm reading the prompter in here. You can read that pablum.
A word show banter is not pablum.
Reality television celebrates the human condition
by illuminating what's extraordinary in the ordinary person.
It warps the minds of our children and weakens the resolve of our allies.
ko: 그것은 우리 아이들의 마음을 왜곡하고 동맹의 결의를 약화시켜.
